userGuide.title: How to Use This Site
userGuide.intro: Welcome to the WWE 2K League Management System! This guide will help you navigate the site and understand all the features available to you.

standingsSection.title: Standings Page
standingsSection.description: The Standings page is the home page and shows the current league rankings.
standingsSection.rankDesc: Player's position based on win percentage
standingsSection.wrestlerDesc: The WWE wrestler they currently play as
standingsSection.divisionDesc: The brand/division the player is assigned to
standingsSection.winPercentDesc: Win percentage calculated from their record
standingsSection.rankingsExplain: Players are ranked by their win percentage. Players with more wins and fewer losses will appear higher on the standings. You can filter standings by division or view all-time vs. per-season records.

seasonsSection.title: Seasons
seasonsSection.description: The league is organized into seasons, which are distinct competitive periods.
seasonsSection.seasonsExplain: Seasons allow the league to track standings separately for each competitive period. This means you can view how players performed in a specific season, as well as their all-time record.
seasonsSection.allTimeDesc: Shows cumulative records across all seasons
seasonsSection.seasonDesc: Shows records for a specific season only
seasonsSection.seasonEndNote: When a season ends, its records are preserved and can be viewed at any time for historical reference.

divisionsSection.title: Divisions
divisionsSection.description: Players may be organized into divisions, similar to WWE's brand splits.
divisionsSection.divisionsExplain: Divisions are groups that players can be assigned to, such as "Raw", "SmackDown", or "NXT". This helps organize the roster and can be used for brand-specific competitions.
divisionsSection.viewingExplain: In the standings, you can see which division each player belongs to. Some players may not be assigned to any division if the league administrator has not set one.

championshipsSection.title: Championships Page
championshipsSection.description: View all the championships in the league and their history.
championshipsSection.step1: Navigate to Championships in the navigation bar
championshipsSection.step2: You'll see all active championships displayed as cards
championshipsSection.historyStep2: A modal window will appear showing the complete history
championshipsSection.historyStep3: The history displays all previous champions, dates won/lost, and total days held

tournamentsSection.title: Tournaments Page
tournamentsSection.description: Follow tournament brackets and standings for ongoing and completed tournaments.
tournamentsSection.typesIntro: The league supports two tournament formats:
tournamentsSection.singleElimItem3: Winners advance to the next round
tournamentsSection.singleElimItem4: Last person standing wins the tournament
tournamentsSection.roundRobinItem1: Every participant faces every other participant
tournamentsSection.roundRobinItem2: Points awarded: Win = 2 pts, Draw = 1 pt, Loss = 0 pts
tournamentsSection.roundRobinItem3: Player with the most points at the end wins

eventsSection.title: Events & PPV
eventsSection.description: View upcoming and past events, including PPVs, weekly shows, and special events.
eventsSection.browsingIntro: Events are organized by type. Use the filter tabs to find specific types:
eventsSection.typePPVDesc: Major events like WrestleMania, SummerSlam, Royal Rumble
eventsSection.typeWeeklyDesc: Regular weekly shows like Raw, SmackDown, NXT
eventsSection.eventDetailsIntro: Click on any event to see its full details:
eventsSection.detailItem1: The full match card with all scheduled bouts
eventsSection.detailItem2: Championship matches highlighted with a special badge
eventsSection.detailItem4: Results for completed events with match outcomes

contendersSection.title: Contender Rankings
contendersSection.description: The Contenders page shows the official #1 contender rankings for each championship.
contendersSection.contendersExplain: Contender rankings are automatically calculated based on recent match performance. Each championship has its own rankings, showing who has earned the right to challenge for the title. Rankings may be locked to specific divisions, meaning only players in the same division as the championship can contend.
contendersSection.rankLabelDesc: The player's contender position (#1 is next in line for a title shot)
contendersSection.scoreLabelDesc: A calculated ranking score based on recent wins and performance
contendersSection.winRateLabelDesc: The player's win percentage during the ranking period

profileSection.title: My Profile
profileSection.description: Your personal wrestler profile page shows your complete league history and statistics.
profileSection.item1: Your wrestler name, image, and division assignment
profileSection.item2: All-time win/loss/draw record and win percentage
profileSection.item3: Per-season records for every season you've competed in
profileSection.item4: Your current championship holdings and contender status

fantasySection.title: Fantasy Wrestling
fantasySection.description: Compete in the fantasy league by picking wrestlers and earning points when they win matches.
fantasySection.step1: When a show opens for picks, browse the available wrestlers and their costs
fantasySection.step2: Select wrestlers within your budget for each division
fantasySection.step3: Your picks earn points when they win matches - bigger matches earn more points
fantasySection.step4: Climb the leaderboard and compete for the top spot among all fantasy players
fantasySection.featurePicksDesc: Choose wrestlers within your salary cap budget for each show
fantasySection.featureLeaderboardDesc: See where you rank against other fantasy players
fantasySection.featureCostsDesc: View wrestler prices that change based on performance trends
fantasySection.featureResultsDesc: Review your picks and see points earned after each show

tipsSection.title: Tips for Following the League
tipsSection.tip2Desc: These are marked with a special badge
tipsSection.tip4Desc: Filter by "Completed" to catch up on results you missed
tipsSection.tip5Desc: See who's next in line for a championship opportunity
tipsSection.tip6Desc: Check out upcoming PPVs and weekly shows for the full match cards
